title: Handle
description: An opaque, access-controlled reference to a raw artifact produced by a tool execution. The actual content is stored in the HandleStore and is not included here. Resolution requires authorization.

handle_id.description: Unique identifier for this Handle. Must not be sufficient to access the artifact without authorization.

capability_id.description: The capability that produced the artifact this Handle references.

artifact_type.description: MIME type or semantic type of the stored artifact (e.g., 'application/json', 'text/plain', 'image/png').

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this Handle was created.

expires_at.description: ISO 8601 expiry timestamp. Null if the artifact does not expire.

access_policy.description: Optional reference to the access policy or policy ID governing who can resolve this Handle.

byte_size.description: Optional size of the artifact in bytes, for capacity planning.
